en: Will you ever stop doing comedy and if not and if not the money what keeps you doing it? Where's uh, who's asking?
ko: 코미디를 그만둘 건가요? 안 그만둔다면 돈 말고 뭐가 동기야?

en: Hi. Hi there uh, I don't think I will stop doing comedy because I love doing it and I think it's
You're of service I like to be of service I I make something that people want I make them happy
And it's it's just it's dopamine and serotonin. I'm like a drug dealer
ko: 행복하게 해주고. 도파민과 세로토닌이야. 마약상 같은 거지.

en: But you've already got the drugs on you I Just kind of tease them out
ko: 근데 이미 약을 갖고 있잖아. 저녁 내내 조금씩 풀어주는 거야.

en: For an evening and I think we've all got to be in service of something
ko: 모두가 뭔가에 봉사해야 한다고 생각해. 나는 여러분에게 봉사하는 게 좋아.

en: Everyone's in service and I think I'd like being in service of you
ko: 모두가 뭔가에 봉사해야 한다고 생각해. 나는 여러분에게 봉사하는 게 좋아.

en: Thanks for coming out. I appreciate it
What do you do man you're a facilitator could you be any more vague
ko: 뭐 해요? 퍼실리테이터요. 그보다 더 모호할 수 있어?

en: I Teach kids you teach kids Are you like a teacher?
ko: 나는 아이들을 가르쳐, 너도 아이들을 가르쳐? 너 선생님 같은 거야?

en: Something like a teacher. This is what we need more of in the world
A lot of men don't go into teaching because they're worried about being called a fucking pedo
But we need strong male role models for kids fucking well played man. Love it Great
ko: 뭐 비슷해요. 이런 사람이 세상에 더 필요해. 많은 남자가 교직에 안 가는 이유가 소아성애자라고 불릴까 봐서거든.
